articles.description: Morocco declared the winners of the 2025 Africa Cup of Nations after Confederation of African Football overturns the result of their final defeat to Senegal.
articles.title: Afcon 2025: Morocco declared the winners after CAF overturns final defeat to Senegal

articles.description: Follow live text updates and listen to BBC Radio commentary from the Champions League last 16 with Arsenal, Chelsea and Manchester City in action.
articles.title: Champions League LIVE: Arsenal vs Bayer Leverkusen, Chelsea vs PSG & Man City vs Real Madrid scores & updates

articles.description: Chelsea suffer their joint-heaviest defeat in a two‑legged European tie, losing 8-2 on aggregate and 3-0 on the night to European champions Paris St‑Germain at Stamford Bridge.
articles.title: Chelsea blown away by PSG to exit Champions League

articles.description: Captain Bernardo Silva's first-half red card proves critical as Real Madrid heap more Champions League misery on Manchester City for the third consecutive season.
articles.title: Man City 1-2 Real Madrid (agg: 1-5) - Vinicius Jr and Haaland score

articles.description: Follow live text commentary, score updates and match stats from Arsenal vs Bayer Leverkusen in the UEFA Champions League
articles.title: Arsenal 2-0 Bayer Leverkusen (3-1 on agg): Gunners cruise into Champions League quarter-finals

articles.description: Bodo/Glimt's dream run in this season's Champions League may be over, but they bow out with their heads held high after making history.
articles.title: Bodo/Glimt's fairytale Champions League run comes to end against Sporting

articles.description: Head coach Arne Slot says he "must have done a lot of things wrong" for Liverpool fans to be "frustrated" at their recent form.
articles.title: Liverpool:  I must have done things wrong to upset Liverpool fans

articles.description: Sports editor Dan Roan analyses whether Chelsea's record fine for a raft of Premier League rule breaches was lenient.
articles.title: Chelsea fine: Was Premier League punishment lenient?

articles.description: Bayern Munich may hand 16-year-old goalkeeper Leonard Prescott his first-team debut in the Champions League on Wednesday.
articles.title: Bayern Munich: 16-year-old Leonard Prescott may have to play in goal in Champions League

articles.description: The president of Iran's football federation says the organisation is negotiating with Fifa to move the country's World Cup matches from the United States to Mexico.
articles.title: World Cup 2026: Iran 'negotiating' with Fifa to move games from US to Mexico
